description: ADK assembly-DRC rule parameter defaults. Consumed by the KLayout deck (klayout/drc/adk_assembly.drc) and the KiCad DRU generator (kicad/dru/generate_assembly_dru.py). Interposer adapters MAY override individual values via Ruby (drc_rules['ASM_b'] = X). v0.2.0 adds the optional interconnect axis (config/interconnect.json); the interposer-only path is unchanged.

rule_descriptions.ASM_b: Minimum spacing between chiplets, in micrometres. Edge-to-edge between adjacent chiplet boundary polygons.
rule_descriptions.ASM_e: Minimum chiplet area, in square micrometres. Chiplet boundary polygons below this threshold are flagged.
